text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of dns/dnstop,
>
> Please note that PR ports/106352 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>   
The content of the patch is approved, although the formatting is
problematic.
There are spaces where the tabs should be (after the =)
Not sure if this is unacceptable or not, I can submit a cleaner patch if
needed.
